name: Risotto Melanisa (Rice with Saffron)
recipeIngredient: 5 cups chicken broth or canned broth
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the broth to a slow simmer.
2. Heat the butter in a heavy, deep pan.
3. Saute the onions until golden.
4. Stir in the rice and saute until well coated.
5. Add the white wine and cook until evaporated.
6. Begin adding the broth 1/2 cup at a time. Continue to add broth when needed for liquid, about 1/4 cup each time.
7. After 15 minutes of cooking, add the saffron and continue cooking, adding more broth until the rice is tender but still firm to the bite (approximately 30-35 minutes total).
8. Just before serving, stir in the Parmesan cheese and remaining tablespoon of butter. Season with salt to taste. Serve immediately. Makes 4 servings.
